blocks.name: DocFusionX
blocks.tagline: LLM-based large-scale document reasoning and retrieval system
blocks.description: Designed a structured GraphRAG-style pipeline integrating retrieval, reranking, and hierarchical traversal to improve long-document reasoning accuracy and reduce hallucination.
blocks.meta:
Best Software Engineering Award
AICOSS International Program Hackathon

blocks.name: SIG:AI
blocks.tagline: AI-based early warning system for small businesses
blocks.description: Built a tabular risk prediction model using financial and operational indicators, and implemented an automated recommendation module to connect predicted risks with actionable strategies.
blocks.meta:
2nd Place Award
SeoulTech CS Department Hackathon

blocks.name: WONNIT
blocks.tagline: Vision-based verification system for space rental platforms
blocks.description: Implemented an AI inspection module to detect item presence and spatial condition before return, enabling a trust-driven rental workflow.
blocks.meta:
Top 2% among 247 teams
LIKELION 13ᵗʰ National Hackathon

blocks.name: CleavAI
blocks.tagline: Deep learning-based peptide cleavage prediction model
blocks.description: Developed a predictive model to estimate peptide cleavage likelihood, leveraging sequence-based representations and deep learning architectures for biological insight extraction.

blocks.name: AminoCompute
blocks.tagline: Computational pipeline for amino acid composition optimization
blocks.description: Built a simulation-based optimization pipeline to design amino acid compositions tailored for specific biological targets, integrating statistical and computational modeling.
